Flame Boy: You know there already is a Joseph Stalin?
Speaker 2: You're kidding.
Flame Boy: Apparently he was this Russian dictator who slaughtered all these people. You'd think you would've known that!
Speaker 2: Y'know, you'd think I would've.
Flame Boy: Phoebe. Whaddyou think a good stage name for me would be?
Speaker 3: ...Flame Boy.
